systems.system_notes: Stem-free anatomic shoulder arthroplasty platform designed to preserve humeral bone stock.

trays.tray_notes: Official Zimmer Biomet materials support dedicated Sidus stem-free instrumentation and linked technique resources.

components.component_notes: Official product materials describe the metaphyseal humeral anchor platform of the stem-free construct.
Official materials describe humeral head options paired with the Sidus stem-free anchor.
Official materials describe compatible glenoid component options within the anatomic shoulder construct.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public Sidus page defines the stem-free shoulder construct but does not expose a public implant code table in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper brochure, IFU, or technique pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
